questions.question: What does "Ieri ho mangiato una pizza" mean in English?
What does "Sono andato al cinema" mean in English?
options: I am going to the cinema
I have gone to the cinema
I will go to the cinema

questions.question: What does "Lei ha comprato un nuovo vestito" mean in English?
options: She is buying a new dress
She will buy a new dress
questions.audio: Lei ha comprato un nuovo vestito

questions.question: What does "Quanto costa questo libro?" mean in English?
options: How much does this book cost?
questions.correct_answer: How much does this book cost?

questions.question: What does "Vado al mercato due volte a settimana" mean in English?
options: I go to the market twice a week
I am going to market two times
I go to the market for two weeks
I went to market two days ago
questions.correct_answer: I go to the market twice a week
questions.audio: Vado al mercato due volte a settimana

questions.question: What does "Mi dispiace, non posso venire" mean in English?
options: I am sorry, I cannot come
I like that, I can come
I am sorry, I can come
I don't like it, I cannot come
questions.correct_answer: I am sorry, I cannot come
